name: Beyond the Bridge
short_description: Beyond the Bridge is a tribute to one of the earliest roguelikes, Moria. Your journey begins with creating your character by choosing a class. From there, you'll explore six procedurally generated levels before reaching the goal of your quest and making your escape!
detailed_description:
Beyond the Bridge is a tribute to one of the earliest roguelikes, Moria. Your journey begins with creating your character by choosing a class. From there, you'll explore six procedurally generated levels before reaching the goal of your quest and making your escape!

What is Beyond the Bridge?

  • A classic roguelike experience

  • 7 procedurally generated levels

  • 5 character classes (four of which are unlockable in-game)

  • An item generation system with three rarity levels and an affix system

  • 12 spells

  • Hidden merchants, craftsmen and bonuses within the levels

  • A progression system allowing you to carry over items and spells between runs
